utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format has 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, total_budget. The final property solution includes all six corresponding sections. Now check if each is fully specified: 1) property: includes selected property name, price, details, and deposit—sufficient. 2) financing: includes solution type, loan amount, down payment, interest rate, amortization, monthly payment, rebate, setup fee—sufficient. 3) legal_services: includes service name, cost, and inclusions—sufficient. 4) moving_services: includes service name, cost, and details—sufficient. 5) setup_services: includes utility setup package, cost, inclusions, timeline, plus survey, insurance, other costs—sufficient. 6) total_budget: includes price, down payment, closing costs, moving costs, utility setup, total additional costs, land transfer benefit, monthly mortgage payment, total monthly housing costs—sufficient. Therefore all 6/6 items are present and fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final property solution selects a purchase property described as 'New Build Contemporary Condo - Option 1' priced at CAD $480,000 with eco-friendly and smart-home features, 95m², which corresponds to 'New Build' in the ground-truth purchase_properties. The financing solution is 'Joint Mortgage through First-Time Buyer Program' with an arrangement/setup fee of CAD $800, matching the 'First-Time Buyer' mortgage in purchase_financing. The legal service chosen is 'Premium Legal Package' at CAD $1,200, which maps directly. The moving service is 'Standard Moving Service with Packing' at CAD $650, aligning with 'Standard Moving'. The utility setup is 'Premium Utilities Package' at CAD $280, matching 'Premium Utilities'. The property survey mentions 'new build inspection' at CAD $400, which maps to 'New Build Inspection'.
